title: Techno Beat
content:
// Four-on-the-floor techno beat using built-in oscillators
stack(
  note("c1").sound("square").s("*4").gain(1.0).lpf(200).lpenv(1),
  note("~ c2 ~ c2").sound("triangle").gain(0.8).room(0.1),
  note("c4*8").sound("sine").gain(0.3).pan(sine.range(0.3, 0.7)),
  note("~ ~ ~ c3").sound("sawtooth").gain(0.5).lpf(1200)
).cpm(135)
